title: Introducing Automations: always-on coding agents
summary: Cursor introduced Automations, a feature for building always-on coding agents that run on schedules or respond to events from Slack, Linear, GitHub, and PagerDuty. These agents can be triggered by messages, issue creation, pull requests, and incidents.
